name: NEUROCRINE BIOSCIENCES INC
business: Neurocrine Biosciences is a neuroscience-focused biopharmaceutical company that develops and commercializes treatments for neurological, psychiatric, endocrine, and immunological disorders. Its marketed products include INGREZZA for tardive dyskinesia and chorea associated with Huntington's disease, and CRENESSITY for classic congenital adrenal hyperplasia. The company also has a collaboration with AbbVie for endometriosis and uterine fibroids.
sellsTo: patients with classic congenital adrenal hyperplasia

exposures.sentence: Our portfolio of products includes U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved treatments for tardive dyskinesia (TD), chorea associated with Huntington's disease, classic congenital adrenal hyperplasia due to 21-hydroxylase deficiency (CAH), and endometriosis and uterine fibroids in collaboration with AbbVie Inc.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 clinical program for osavampator in major depressive disorder with topline data expected
catalysts.sentence: We have initiated a comprehensive Phase 3 clinical program for osavampator in MDD (with initial topline data expected in 2027)

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 clinical program for direclidine in schizophrenia with topline data expected
catalysts.sentence: We have initiated a comprehensive Phase 3 clinical program for direclidine in schizophrenia (with initial topline data expected in 2027)

catalysts.event: IND filing for NBIP-2118 (CRF-2 agonist for obesity) and advancement into Phase 1
catalysts.sentence: We view NBIP-2118 as a potential first-in-class metabolic therapy, and plan to file an investigational new drug application (IND) with the FDA and advance NBIP-2118 into Phase 1 development in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of INGREZZA and CRENESSITY sales team expansion
catalysts.sentence: We expect this expansion, which we anticipate completing by the end of the first quarter of 2026, will boost our reach and frequency with prescribers

tamClaims.claim: TD affects approximately 800,000 people in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that TD affects approximately 800,000 people in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 90% of the 40,000 people in the U.S. affected by Huntington's disease will develop chorea.
tamClaims.sentence: approximately 90% of the 40,000 people in the U.S. affected by Huntington s disease will develop chorea

tamClaims.claim: CAH affects at least 20,000 people in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: CAH affects at least 20,000 people in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Schizophrenia affects approximately 24 million people globally and more than 3 million people in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Schizophrenia is a severe, disabling disorder affecting approximately 24 million people globally and more than 3 million people in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Over 16 million people in the U.S. live with major depressive disorder (MDD).
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately one-third of over 16 million people in the U.S. who live with MDD do not achieve adequate relief with existing antidepressants

tamClaims.claim: Over 6 million Americans live with Alzheimer's disease.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that over 6 million Americans live with Alzheimer s
